index.title: Cemal Alacati
index.description: Discover the historic texture of Hacı Memiş, where stone architecture meets Aegean hospitality. A peaceful and luxurious stay awaits you at Cemal Alaçatı.

hero.title: A Boutique Story
hero.subtitle: Rediscover peace and luxury in the heart of Alaçatı.

hero.badge: An Authentic Experience in the Heart of Alaçatı
hero.subtitle: Cobblestone streets, an outdoor pool, and the warmth of a boutique home — feel the spirit of the Aegean in every detail.

booking.default_message: Hello, could I get more information about a reservation for the '{room}' room at {hotel}?

gallery.title: Hotel Gallery
gallery.seo_description: Explore the stone architecture, elegant rooms, and peaceful atmosphere of Cemal Alaçatı. Moments from the Alaçatı boutique hotel experience.
gallery.schema_description: Professional shots of our hotel's exterior, interior spaces, and restaurant areas.
gallery.subtitle: A Visual Journey
gallery.description: Discover the perfect harmony of modern minimalism and sophisticated details in the heart of Alaçatı. Take a short journey through our living spaces, where every frame holds peace and aesthetics.

historicalPlaces.title: Historical Texture
historicalPlaces.story: Our building, which has witnessed the history of Alaçatı, has been transformed into a boutique hotel while preserving its authentic stone architecture.

exterior.title: Exterior Architecture
exterior.story: Crafted with Alaçatı's signature stone texture, our building hosts a different play of light at every hour of the day.

restaurant.title: Aegean Table
restaurant.story: A gastronomic feast prepared with hand-picked olives, fresh oven-baked bread, and the freshest products from local producers.

events.title: Life and Activity
events.story: From soul-soothing yoga sessions to bicycle tours exploring the narrow streets of Alaçatı, we make every moment valuable.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.story: In our interior spaces, where antique objects blend with modern comfort, you will feel as if you are in an art gallery.

gallery.empty: No images found in this category yet.

rooms_section.title: A Unique Stay Experience
rooms_section.subtitle: PEACE & COMFORT
rooms_section.no_rooms_found: No rooms found in the selected category.
rooms_section.description: We combined the ancient stone texture of the Aegean with the simplicity of modern minimalism. Discover perfect comfort and serenity in our living spaces, each telling its own story.

footer.motto: In the most beautiful corner of Alaçatı; the warmth of the stone, the breeze, and the Aegean.
